steps.title: Use the triangle sum
steps.content:
The triangle has angles $90^{\circ}$, $13^{\circ}$, and $a^{\circ}$. The three angle measures in any triangle must add to $180^{\circ}$, so write one equation.
$$
90+13+a=180
$$

steps.title: Find the missing angle
steps.content: Solve for $a$. $$ a=180-90-13=77 $$ The answer is B.
